ul.li: RSP % 16 == 0 before calling interpreter_loop (C ABI compliance).
All callee-saved registers (RBX, RBP, R12-R15) must be identical before ret.
Memory: Stack-allocated frame ensures cache locality with current CPU thread context.
VM exceptions are trapped in the loop and converted to numeric status codes in RAX.

g.text: push rax, rbx, rcx, rdx, rsi, rdi, r8-r15
